children.text: is held under a plan described in section 401(a) or 403(a), under a program described in section 403(b), or under an individual retirement plan,

children.label: C
children.text: is a qualified funding asset (as defined in section 130(d), but without regard to whether there is a qualified assignment),

children.label: D
children.text: is purchased by an employer upon the termination of a plan described in section 401(a) or 403(a) and is held by the employer until all amounts under such contract are distributed to the employee for whom such contract was purchased or the employee’s beneficiary, or

children.label: E
children.text: is an immediate annuity.

children.label: A
children.text: which is purchased with a single premium or annuity consideration,

children.label: B
children.text: the annuity starting date (as defined in subsection (c)(4)) of which commences no later than 1 year from the date of the purchase of the annuity, and

children.label: C
children.text: which provides for a series of substantially equal periodic payments (to be made not less frequently than annually) during the annuity period.

children.heading: 10-percent additional tax for taxable distributions from modified endowment contracts
children.label: v 10-percent additional tax for taxable distributions from modified endowment contracts

children.heading: Imposition of additional tax
children.label: 1 Imposition of additional tax
children.text: If any taxpayer receives any amount under a modified endowment contract (as defined in section 7702A), the taxpayer’s tax under this chapter for the taxable year in which such amount is received shall be increased by an amount equal to 10 percent of the portion of such amount which is includible in gross income.

children.heading: Subsection not to apply to certain distributions
children.label: 2 Subsection not to apply to certain distributions
A
children.text: made on or after the date on which the taxpayer attains age 59½,

children.label: B
children.text: which is attributable to the taxpayer’s becoming disabled (within the meaning of subsection (m)(7)), or

children.label: C
children.text: which is part of a series of substantially equal periodic payments (not less frequently than annually) made for the life (or life expectancy) of the taxpayer or the joint lives (or joint life expectancies) of such taxpayer and his beneficiary.

children.heading: Application of basis rules to nonresident aliens
children.label: w Application of basis rules to nonresident aliens

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of this section, for purposes of determining the portion of any distribution which is includible in gross income of a distributee who is a citizen or resident of the United States, the investment in the contract shall not include any applicable nontaxable contributions or applicable nontaxable earnings.

children.label: i
children.text: for labor or personal services performed by an employee who, at the time the labor or services were performed, was a nonresident alien for purposes of the laws of the United States in effect at such time, and

children.label: ii
children.text: which is treated as from sources without the United States, and

children.label: B
children.text: which was not subject to income tax (and would have been subject to income tax if paid as cash compensation when the services were rendered) under the laws of the United States or any foreign country.

children.label: A
children.text: which are paid or accrued with respect to any employer or employee contribution which was made with respect to compensation for labor or personal services performed by an employee,

children.label: B
children.text: with respect to which the employee was at the time the earnings were paid or accrued a nonresident alien for purposes of the laws of the United States, and

children.label: C
children.text: which were not subject to income tax under the laws of the United States or any foreign country.

children.heading: Regulations
children.label: 4 Regulations
children.text: The Secretary shall prescribe such regulations as may be necessary to carry out the provisions of this subsection, including regulations treating contributions and earnings as not subject to tax under the laws of any foreign country where appropriate to carry out the purposes of this subsection.

children.heading: Cross reference
children.label: x Cross reference
children.text: For limitation on adjustments to basis of annuity contracts sold, see section 1021.
